title: Fragrant Indian Sardines Curry
description: A smoky, glassy-jelly curry featuring roasted sardines, aloo-gobi, and tangy pickle for a post-workout boost.
instructions: Clean the cedar plank and set it on a shallow pan with a thin layer of water.
Heat a skillet over medium-high and add the sardines, seasoning with salt, then cook until lightly browned on both sides.
Remove the sardines and set aside while you sauté the onion until translucent in the same skillet.
Stir in the ginger garlic paste, green chili, turmeric, cumin seeds, coriander powder, and chili powder; cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced potato, cauliflower florets, and tomato; cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Pour in the low-fat coconut milk, add the mustard pickle, and bring to a gentle simmer.
Cover and cook for 15 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
Return the roasted sardines to the skillet, cover, and simmer for an additional 5 minutes for flavors to meld.
Stir in the lemon juice, adjust salt, and swirl the heat off.
Serve the curry directly from the cedar plank for a fragrant presentation.
